title: anthyllis hegetschweileri
intro: Anthyllis hegetschweileri, also known as Hegetschweiler's kidney vetch, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Anthyllis hegetschweileri include relieving urinary tract issues, reducing swelling, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
